scripts.test:k6: k6 run test/load/baseline.js && k6 run test/load/spike.js && k6 run test/load/soak.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:api && npm run test:chaos && npm run test:property && npm run test:playwright
scripts.test:full: npm run test:e2e && npm run test:synthetic && npm run test:visual && npm run test:k6
